hero_desc_full: Here at PORTAL ÂMBAR, you will find a path. A path to a stronger, more flexible, more artistic, more creative, and more powerful body. A path to find and develop your identity with the precision of technique and the power of art.
sec1_title:
We believe in the body as power.
In dance as expression.
In creativity as a path
sec1_p1: The Portal Âmbar was created for you who wish to expand your training and studies beyond the studio walls. For those who want to train with freedom and autonomy. Through a tested and consistent methodology, developed by Mariana Souza, the portal's teacher, we will guide you along the artistic path progressively, with basic, intermediate, and advanced modules, so you can always consolidate your foundations and keep developing.
sec1_p2: Here, you learn at your own pace, anytime, with complete classes of strengthening, flexibility, choreographies, specific exercises, and much more. All modules were designed for you to expand your repertoire, prepare your body, and feed your creativity.
sec1_li1: <svg class="w-6 h-6 text-ambar-orange" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"></path></svg> From basic to advanced at your own pace
sec1_li2: <svg class="w-6 h-6 text-ambar-orange" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"></path></svg> New classes every month
sec1_li3: <svg class="w-6 h-6 text-ambar-orange" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"></path></svg> Bonus classes with special guests
sec2_title: Everything you will achieve with Portal Âmbar
sec2_c1_p: Strengthening sequences with and without pole to safely prepare your body
sec2_c2_p: Complete flexibility classes to improve your stretching and mobility
sec2_c3_p: Complete choreographies with and without heels to expand your artistic repertoire
sec2_c4_p: Pole combo sequences, exotic sequences, tricks and transitions with and without heels, handstands and floorwork classes
sec2_c5_p: Be part of a welcoming community that evolves together, respects your time and celebrates every step of your journey
sec2_c6_p: Feel proud of your body and what it is capable of doing while developing your artistic identity without pressure or judgment
sec3_card1_p: Here you will find complete classes to prepare your body for any of our practices.
sec3_card2_p: Here you will find classes to strengthen your body freely and classes with exercises performed on the Pole that will be functional for the development of your technique and strength on the pole.
sec3_card3_p: In this module you will find classes that will help you develop your mobility and stretching. As well as specific flexibility tricks training.
sec3_card4_p: Here you will find our short sequences and combos with and without heels that can add to and help unlock your creativity in contact with the pole.
sec3_card5_p: Here we have several exotic sequences of specific techniques such as legworks, walks, edge works, and much more. They will assist you in technical development, in addition to training musicality and body expression.
sec3_card6_p: In our tricks section you will find exercises and training to develop your acrobatics in a technical and creative way such as drops, flips, cradle, handstands and much more.
sec3_card7_p: Here you will find our choreographies with and without heels. Full of musicality and creativity, with the signature of each teacher so that you can train and develop your expressiveness.
sec4_subtitle: Award-winning professionals passionate about transformation through pole dance.
sec4_t1_role: Founder and creator of Portal Âmbar
sec4_t1_desc: A pole dance practitioner for 9 years, Mariana had never done other dances or gymnastics before finding pole. She developed all her strength, flexibility, and artistic side through practice.
sec4_t1_quote: "I believe every body is capable of learning, developing, and transforming at any age!"
sec4_t2_desc: A Pole Dance practitioner for 14 years, she is also Co-founder of Studio Gravitarte Dança e Aéreos in Curitiba-PR. She collects several important titles and nominations in the national and international scene.
sec4_t2_quote: "I believe in and develop Pole Dance as a powerful and transformative form of artistic expression."
sec5_desc: Still have doubts if Portal Âmbar is the right place for you or how our access works? We separated the answers to the most common questions.
faq_a1: You have up to 7 days to cancel and we will refund your money in full.
faq_a2: No, you only have the first 7 days available for cancellation and refund. After that, you commit to the 1-year subscription.
faq_a3: Unlimited access to all recorded classes, bonuses, and community for a period of 1 year.
faq_a4: No, the classes are permanent within your 1-year access period.
faq_q5: I am a beginner, is this course for me?
faq_a5: Yes! We have basic modules, but it is necessary that you have had some previous contact with pole dance or exotic to take classes in these modalities. As for classes that do not require a pole, they are for all levels!
faq_q6: Which class do I start with?
faq_a6: It depends on which modality you wish to practice, but it is always important to start with one of the warm-ups, go through a strengthening class, and only then go to the specific ones. We have a PDF with combo suggestions to guide your workouts!
faq_q7: I don't have a pole, is this course for me?
faq_a7: Yes! We have several classes that do not depend on the pole. Take the opportunity to strengthen your body, develop your flexibility, and learn free tricks. When you have your own pole, you can apply all this foundation to the other classes.
faq_q8: I have no strength or flexibility, can I do it?
faq_a8: Absolutely! The platform is for all bodies. You will gradually develop and gain your strength and flexibility throughout the classes.
faq_a9:
Payment methods: Credit card up to 12x, PIX, or Boleto.

New Classes: We have new classes every month!

Use of heels: You can take classes with or without heels, however you feel most comfortable.

Support: We have an exclusive WhatsApp channel to exchange ideas and ask questions with the community and teachers!
pricing_subtitle: Get immediate access to all classes and the Portal Âmbar community.
souza_c1: Two-time Pro Pole Art Brazil Champion 2022/2023
souza_c4: Best Choreography Champion Exotic Generation BR
souza_c5: Best Leg Works Champion Exotic Generation BR
souza_c8: Best Dancer Nomination - Timbó Dance Festival 2025
souza_c9: Creator and producer of Sexy September Festival
